calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner Donna M. Stevensons Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Sep-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
David Monsour, Esq. (925-314-9999; david@barryounglaw.com) of Barr & Young Attorneys for Petitioner.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER DONNA STEVENSON's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon:

Donna Stevenson's unopposed "petition to confirm arbitration award and enter judgement thereon" is granted.

order and judgment are signed.
